settings.heading: Pharmacy-led aesthetics for verified UK clinicians.
settings.subheading: Prescription-only medicines and practitioner-only supplies, dispensed and dispatched from our GPhC-registered UK pharmacy. Trade access is granted once your professional credentials are verified.

settings.title: Injectables
settings.description: Prescription-only medicines for licensed practitioners. Products and pricing are hidden from public view in line with MHRA advertising regulations.

settings.title: Skin Boosters
settings.description: Hyaluronic-acid treatments supplied for hydration and skin quality. Visible to registered practitioners; pricing shown once verified.

settings.heading: Two ranges. Verified access.
settings.lede: Our catalogue is reserved for registered clinicians. Browse the ranges below — full product details and trade pricing become available once your credentials are verified.

settings.title: Register
settings.copy: Submit your name, business details, and proof of professional registration through our practitioner form.

settings.title: Verification
settings.copy: Our pharmacy team reviews your credentials, typically within one to two business days.

settings.title: Order
settings.copy: Once approved, browse the full catalogue at trade pricing and order on prescription or for clinic stock.

settings.title: Dispatch
settings.copy: Tracked, temperature-controlled dispatch from our UK pharmacy, with status updates at every stage.

settings.heading: How verification and ordering works.
settings.lede: A short, deliberate process designed around regulated supply.

settings.title: Pharmacy-led & GPhC-registered
settings.copy: Every order is reviewed and dispensed under the oversight of a UK-registered responsible pharmacist.

settings.title: MHRA-licensed wholesale
settings.copy: Sourced, stored, and traced under MHRA WDA(H) controls — a documented chain from manufacturer to clinic.

settings.title: Built for clinicians
settings.copy: Prescription and clinic-stock orders are handled separately at checkout, with the correct VAT applied to each line.

settings.heading: Built for clinicians, run as a pharmacy.

settings.question: Who can register?
settings.answer: Registration is open to UK-based aesthetic practitioners, medical professionals, and accredited training academies. We verify each applicant against the appropriate professional register (e.g. GMC, NMC, GPhC, GDC) before approving an account.

settings.question: How long does verification take?
settings.answer: Most applications are reviewed within one to two business days. You will receive an email confirmation once your account has been approved.

settings.question: Why can't I see prices or all products?
settings.answer: Prescription-only medicines may not be advertised to the public under MHRA regulations, and trade pricing is reserved for verified practitioners. Both become visible once your account is approved.

settings.question: What is the difference between a prescription order and clinic stock?
settings.answer: Prescription orders are linked to a named patient and dispensed against a valid prescription — these lines are zero-rated for VAT. Clinic-stock orders are supplied to your practice without a patient-specific prescription and are subject to standard VAT. You select the basis at the basket stage.

settings.question: How are orders dispatched?
settings.answer: Orders are dispatched from our UK pharmacy via tracked, temperature-controlled courier. Cold-chain products are packed with appropriate insulation and shipped on next-day services where possible.

settings.question: Where do you ship?
settings.answer: We currently supply verified practitioners across the United Kingdom only.
